sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: (TFC) Movement as an Input in Quant Signal Sets
feed.summary: This article analyzes Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) using AI models to generate quantitative trading signals. It identifies a near-term strong sentiment, mid-term neutrality, and long-term positive bias, along with elevated downside risk due to a lack of long-term support signals. The report provides three distinct trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging) and multi-timeframe signal analysis for TFC.

feed.title: How Royal Caribbean’s New Tri‑Branded Credit Cards At Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group launched new tri-branded credit cards (Royal ONE and Royal ONE Plus) with Bank of America, allowing customers to earn and redeem rewards across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity, and Silversea cruises. This initiative aims to deepen customer loyalty and boost guest monetization through everyday spending tied to cruise benefits. While enhancing the loyalty ecosystem, the credit cards do not alter near-term investment influences like consumer spending sensitivity or booking slowdown risks, but could strengthen long-term guest spending alongside new ship launches.

feed.title: Materion initiated with an Outperform at Baird
feed.summary: Baird analyst Daniel Moore initiated coverage of Materion (MTRN) with an Outperform rating and a $18 price target. Moore believes Materion's shares are trading at a multi-year price-to-tangible-book low and that its financials are near a cyclical trough. The firm also indicates that the broader freight economy is showing signs of recovery, which could benefit Materion.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Autodesk (ADSK) March 2026
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley reaffirmed its Overweight rating on Autodesk (ADSK) on March 18, 2026, citing the February billings index as a supporting factor. No new price target was issued, indicating continued confidence in prior assumptions. The stock has experienced a -5.18% decline since the rating, yet Meyka AI rates ADSK with an 'A' grade based on various financial metrics and analyst consensus.

feed.title: T-Mobile US, Inc. Stock: Navigating 5G Leadership, Earnings Outlook, and Competitive Pressures Ahead
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. is highlighted for its dominant position in the U.S. wireless market due to its aggressive 5G rollout and subscriber growth. Investors are looking forward to the Q1 2026 earnings report, monitoring subscriber trends and ARPU, especially given recent share volatility and competitive pressures. The company's financial health, dividend initiation, and strategic expansions in 5G and potentially broadband are key factors for North American investors despite market headwinds and regulatory scrutiny.

feed.title: BMO Capital Calls Parker-Hannifin (PH) “Best-in-Class,” Initiates with Outperform
feed.summary: BMO Capital initiated coverage of Parker-Hannifin Corporation (PH) with an Outperform rating and a $1,090 price target, calling it "best-in-class" due to its strong margin profile, diversified growth segments, and acquisition track record. The company reported record quarterly sales of $5.2 billion in fiscal Q2 2026, with significant organic growth and improved operating margins. Parker-Hannifin is also planning to acquire Filtration Group Corporation and is focusing on expanding its presence in faster-growing markets and the Off-Highway segment.

feed.title: Will Newmont’s (NEM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Reframe Its Sensitivity To Higher Gold Prices?
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NEM) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 23, an event gaining significant attention due to recent surges in gold prices. The upcoming earnings call will be crucial for investors to understand how Newmont's profits and outlook are affected by the metal market's strength, especially considering its close ties to bullion prices and capital allocation. Analysts are revisiting their revenue and earnings forecasts, with some predicting substantial upside potential for the company.

feed.title: [Form 4] FIRST SOLAR, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: FIRST SOLAR, INC. director Anita M. George reported the acquisition of 267 shares of Common Stock as quarterly equity compensation, not an open-market purchase, at a stated price of $0.00 per share. Following this grant, made on March 31, 2026, she directly holds 5,015 shares of First Solar common stock. This transaction was detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, categorizing it as an equity award for non-associate directors.

feed.title: First Solar (FSLR) director receives 267-share quarterly equity grant
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) director, Venkata S. M. Renduchintala, was granted 267 shares of Common Stock as quarterly equity compensation, increasing his direct holdings to 1,910 shares. This transaction, reported on a Form 4 filing, is a routine compensation award, not an open-market trade. The grant is part of the company's compensation program for non-associate directors.

feed.title: Director Ling Yong files initial Form 3 for Lianhe Sowell (LHSW)
feed.summary: Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd director Ling Yong has filed an initial ownership report on Form 3, establishing him as an insider for SEC reporting purposes. The filing indicates a neutral sentiment and does not list any transactions or derivative positions in the company's securities, serving primarily as an opening inventory sheet of his beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Think Western Digital (WDC) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts give Western Digital (WDC) an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.28, indicating a "Strong Buy" to "Buy" rating, with 21 out of 25 firms recommending a Strong Buy. However, the article cautions against relying solely on ABR due to potential analyst bias and suggests using the Zacks Rank, which for WDC is currently a #3 (Hold), to validate investment decisions. This discrepancy highlights the importance of individual research beyond brokerage recommendations.

feed.title: News Corp Details US$1 Billion Share Repurchase Focused on Nasdaq-Listed Stock
feed.summary: News Corp is proceeding with a US$1 billion share repurchase program targeting its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock, deliberately excluding ASX-listed CDIs. This strategic move aims to optimize capital allocation, potentially boost earnings per share, and signal confidence in the company's valuation. The program allows for flexible repurchases based on market conditions and other factors influencing its capital strategy.

feed.title: News Corp Outlines US$1 Billion Share Repurchase Plan for Nasdaq-Listed Stock
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This buy-back initiative, which excludes ASX CDIs, is part of the company's capital management strategy and will be executed based on market conditions. The program is expected to impact the liquidity and earnings per share of its U.S.-listed stock.

feed.title: Lumen (LUMN) Soars 8.8%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
feed.summary: Lumen Technologies (LUMN) saw its shares surge by 8.8% in the last trading session, driven by its sharp AI pivot and strong demand for its Private Connectivity Fabric solutions. The company is actively deleveraging, having reduced total debt by over $5 billion since January 2025 and significantly lowering annual interest expenses. Despite positive developments in AI and cost reduction, the consensus EPS estimate for the upcoming quarter has been revised 40% lower, raising questions about sustained stock price appreciation.

feed.title: Mirum Pharmaceuticals (MIRM) Moves 5.1% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
feed.summary: Mirum Pharmaceuticals (MIRM) saw its shares increase by 5.1% due to higher than average trading volume, likely driven by positive developments in its phase III EXPAND study for Livmarli. Although revenue is expected to grow significantly, the consensus EPS estimate for the quarter has remained unchanged, and the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold). Investors are advised to watch for trends in earnings estimate revisions to determine if the stock's recent strength will continue.

feed.title: First Solar (FSLR) director awarded 374-share quarterly stock grant
feed.summary: First Solar director Michael J. Ahearn reported receiving a grant of 374 shares of Common Stock as quarterly equity compensation for non-associate directors. These shares were awarded at no cash cost to him. Following this grant, Ahearn directly holds 65,744 First Solar shares and indirectly owns 47,857 shares held by a trust.

feed.title: Wells Fargo (WFC) Valuation Check As Bank Risk Headlines And Geopolitical Tensions Resurface
feed.summary: Recent headlines concerning bank exposure to nonbank financial institutions and Wells Fargo's adjusted S&P 500 outlook have led to a re-examination of big bank risk profiles. While one narrative suggests Wells Fargo is 7.9% overvalued at its current price of US$80.57 with a fair value of $74.70, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates it is trading at a 37.2% discount with an estimated future cash flow value of $128.28. Investors are encouraged to consider both perspectives and key risks, such as potential setbacks on lifting the asset cap and a weaker housing/manufacturing credit demand.

feed.title: How Darden’s Mixed Q3 Results and Updated 2026 Outlook Will Impact Darden Restaurants (DRI) Investors
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants (DRI) reported mixed Q3 fiscal 2026 results with increased sales but slightly lower net income and earnings per share compared to the previous year. The company provided an updated fiscal 2026 sales outlook, projecting approximately 9.5% growth, including 4.5% same-restaurant sales growth, and continues its capital return program with a $1.50 quarterly dividend and share repurchases. While the company's long-term narrative projects revenue and earnings growth, investors are advised to consider risks such as softer guest counts and rising operating costs.

feed.title: Molson Coors (TAP) director receives 334-share deferred stock grant in lieu of cash
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co director Charles M. Herington was granted 334 shares of Class B Common Stock as deferred stock units on March 31, 2026, in lieu of cash compensation. These units, valued at $0.00 per share, will vest upon his termination as a director, aligning his compensation with the length of his board tenure. Following this grant, Herington directly holds 61,585 shares of Class B Common Stock.

feed.title: Molson Coors (NYSE: TAP) director gets 668 Class B stock award
feed.summary: Molson Coors Beverage Co. director Christian P. Cocks was awarded 668 shares of Class B Common Stock as equity compensation, granted in lieu of cash compensation. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing and is classified as an acquisition. Following this award, Mr. Cocks directly holds a total of 5,302 Class B shares in the company.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin-built Orion Spacecraft Sends Astronauts Moonward for the First Time in 53 Years
feed.summary: NASA's Orion spacecraft, built by Lockheed Martin, launched on the Artemis II mission with four astronauts, marking the first crewed return to the Moon in 53 years. The 10-day mission, with the spacecraft named "Integrity," will test new systems designed for deep space travel and gather crucial data on human health and spacecraft performance before splashing down in the Pacific Ocean. This mission is a significant step towards future crewed landings on the lunar surface.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin-built Orion Spacecraft Sends Astronauts Moonward for the First Time in 53 Years
feed.summary: The Lockheed Martin-built Orion spacecraft launched on NASA's Artemis II mission on April 1, 2026, marking the first crewed test flight to lunar vicinity in 53 years. Four astronauts will undertake a 10-day journey, traveling nearly 250,000 miles and about 5,000 miles beyond the Moon's far side, testing new systems on the "Integrity" spacecraft. This mission is crucial for collecting deep-space performance and human health data to prepare for future lunar landings.

feed.title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Announces Upcoming Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) has announced the dates for its first-quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call, issued on April 1, 2026. This event will provide investors and analysts with key insights into the company's financial performance and strategic direction. Further details regarding the exact timing of the release and call are anticipated.

feed.title: Mannatech Delays Annual Report Amid Liquidity Concerns
feed.summary: Mannatech (MTEX) has announced a delay in filing its 2025 annual Form 10-K report due to a potential "going concern" issue raised by its independent auditor and ongoing liquidity concerns. The company is evaluating the implications, consulting advisors, and finalizing a cost-reduction plan to address declining sales, operating losses, and negative operating cash flow. Mannatech expects to file the report within fifteen days and does not anticipate significant changes to annual operating results.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Secures $3 Billion Credit Facility and Launches Commercial Paper Program
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) has secured a new $3 billion unsecured revolving credit facility and launched a commercial paper program for an additional $3 billion. These strategic financial moves are aimed at enhancing the company's liquidity, supporting working capital, and funding other general corporate purposes. The initiatives reflect ServiceNow's proactive approach to managing financial resources to capitalize on growth opportunities.

feed.title: MINISO Group Holding Ltd (MNSO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Expansion
feed.summary: MINISO Group Holding Ltd (MNSO) achieved record quarterly revenue of RMB6.25 billion in Q4 2025, driven by strong international expansion and strategic initiatives. The company reported significant growth in both MINISO and TOP TOY brands and outlined plans for further domestic and international expansion in 2026, focusing on IP collaborations, optimized supply chains, and store format transformations. Despite robust growth, the company faced increased operating expenses, a slight decline in gross profit margin, and challenges in the Southeast Asia market.

feed.title: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd. Reduces Stake in Aflac Inc.
feed.summary: Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd. has slightly reduced its stake in Aflac Inc. by selling 14,000 shares, a move that had a minor impact on its portfolio but reflects a strategic adjustment. Despite this reduction, Aflac Inc. remains the top holding for Japan Post Holdings, with the firm maintaining a significant 10.10% portfolio allocation to the insurance company. Aflac Inc. is valued with a PE ratio of 15.94 and a GF Score of 73/100, indicating average performance potential amidst other notable investors like Gotham Asset Management.

feed.title: Kymera Therapeutics COO sells $1.9 million in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kymera Therapeutics COO Jeremy G. Chadwick sold 22,240 shares of common stock for approximately $1.9 million on March 31 and April 1, 2026. This sale, executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, followed a 237% stock rally and occurred while the stock was deemed overvalued by InvestingPro. Chadwick also exercised options for the same number of shares, increasing his direct ownership to 61,202 shares after these transactions.

feed.title: Richmond American Announces New Community in Las Vegas
feed.summary: Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc. is opening Eldorado Springs, a new community in Las Vegas featuring two-story homes with 3 to 4 bedrooms. A Grand Opening event is scheduled for Saturday, April 4, inviting prospective homebuyers and agents to explore the community, enjoy complimentary lunch, and participate in a prize drawing. Eldorado Springs is a gated community conveniently located near major highways, the airport, shopping, dining, and entertainment.

feed.title: Ventas Exceeds $50 Billion in Enterprise Value Amid Growing Senior Housing Demand and Record Daily Trading Volume
feed.summary: Ventas Inc (VTR) has reached an enterprise value exceeding $50 billion, driven by strong earnings, strategic expansion in senior housing, and favorable demographic trends. The company reported a 50% EPS surprise in Q4 2025, 9% annual growth in normalized FFO per share, and plans an 8% dividend increase and $2.5 billion investment in its senior housing portfolio for 2026. Despite potential challenges from rising operating costs, Ventas is well-positioned for continued growth due to its strong financial standing and increasing demand for senior living services.

feed.title: Stock Market Rally on De-escalation News: First Solar, FTAI Aviation Jump - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The stock market saw a rebound driven by news of de-escalation in military hostilities and stabilizing oil prices, which alleviated inflation fears. Several companies, including FTAI Aviation, Keysight, First Solar, Powell, and Builders FirstSource, experienced significant stock gains. First Solar's volatile stock movement was noted, with the day's jump suggesting the market perceived the de-escalation news as meaningful but not fundamentally altering its business perception.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Caton Frates Sells 700 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corp (COST)
feed.summary: Caton Frates, Executive Vice President of a Costco Wholesale Corp branch, sold 700 shares on April 1, 2026, reducing their holding to 5,815.001 shares. Over the past year, Frates has sold 2,240 shares with no purchases, contributing to a total of 18 insider sells and no buys for COST. The stock is currently trading at $993, deemed fairly valued by GuruFocus with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.02.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Price Target for Utility Stock Pinnacle West ()
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Pinnacle West Capital to $101 from $97, maintaining an "Equal Weight" rating, following the utility company's recent earnings beat. Despite the target raise, the company's full-year guidance for 2026 ($4.55 to $4.75 EPS) remains below the broader market consensus of $5.13, leading to a mixed outlook among analysts. Pinnacle West Capital, trading near its 52-week high, is seen as a dividend play, with its future stock performance dependent on bridging the gap between internal forecasts and market expectations, alongside successful infrastructure investments and stable margins.

feed.title: JMSB Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:JMSB
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive information on John Marshall Bancorp, Inc. (JMSB) stock, including its current price, historical performance, key financial statistics, and analyst ratings. It details the company's financial health, upcoming earnings, and how various ETFs hold JMSB shares, offering investors a complete overview.

feed.title: Are Consumer Discretionary Stocks Lagging LiveOne (LVO) This Year?
feed.summary: LiveOne (LVO) and Perdoceo Education (PRDO), both in the Consumer Discretionary sector, are outperforming their peers this year. LVO has returned 8.1% compared to the sector's 8.1% loss, while PRDO has seen a 26.9% return. Both companies currently hold a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy), indicating positive analyst sentiment and earnings outlooks.

feed.title: LAKE DEADLINE NOTICE: Lakeland Industries, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP is encouraging investors of Lakeland Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ:LAKE) who suffered losses to contact them by April 24, 2026, to discuss rights in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Lakeland misrepresented the performance of its Pacific Helmets and Jolly businesses, experiencing significant issues including shipping delays, production problems, and slower new product rollouts, leading to overstated financial impacts. Several instances of declining share prices followed financial reports detailing missed consensus estimates and deteriorating business performance, prompting this call to action for affected investors.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of HWH International Inc. (NASDAQ:HWH)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of HWH International Inc. (NASDAQ:HWH) based on various indicators including moving averages, oscillators, and pivots. It compiles these indicators into a summary gauge to suggest whether the stock is a buy, sell, or neutral. The analysis highlights that and the overall technical rating for HWH International Inc. is "sell," with oscillators showing a "neutral" rating and moving averages indicating a "strong sell."

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Maintains Top Trading Volume Even as Share Price Falls by 3.29%
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) saw its share price drop by 3.29% on April 1, 2026, despite maintaining the highest trading volume at $320 million, indicating high investor activity. The decline is attributed to inconsistent financial results, including fluctuating net income and rising operating expenses, which outweighed positive aspects like strategic acquisitions, new AI-driven products, and robust revenue guidance for fiscal year 2025. This situation highlights a tension between the company's strong fundamentals and ongoing investor concerns about profitability and cost management in a competitive market.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper taps JDE Peet’s CEO to lead coffee company
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper has appointed Rafael Oliveira, CEO of JDE Peet's NV, to lead its combined coffee business, which is slated to become an independent entity from the soda maker. This decision follows earlier investor skepticism regarding the debt Keurig would undertake for the JDE Peet's acquisition. The company aims to split into separate beverage and coffee businesses by the end of the year.

feed.title: Aptiv PLC (APTV) Completes Spin-Off of Versigent Limited
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC (APTV) has completed the spin-off of its subsidiary, Versigent Limited, distributing one ordinary share of Versigent for every three Aptiv shares held by shareholders as of March 17, 2026. Versigent's shares are now trading on the NYSE under "VGNT," allowing both companies to focus on their core operations and potentially enhance shareholder value. Pro forma financial information related to the spin-off will be released in an amendment to Form 8-K.

feed.title: Jaguar Health Delays Annual Form 10-K Filing
feed.summary: Jaguar Health (JAGX) has announced a delay in filing its annual Form 10-K report for December 31, 2025, due to complex subsequent event disclosures. The company expects to file within 15 days, consistent with SEC regulations, and does not anticipate significant changes to its annual results. Analysts currently hold a Neutral view on JAGX stock, citing weak financial performance but acknowledging encouraging clinical progress.

feed.title: Assessing JD.com (NasdaqGS:JD) Valuation As Shares Trade Around Recent US$28.87 Level
feed.summary: Shares of JD.com (NasdaqGS:JD) are currently trading at US$28.87, showing mixed short-term and long-term returns. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is significantly undervalued with a fair value of $82.68, based on robust 2025 projections including strong revenue growth and improved net margins. However, this valuation depends on policy alignment and JD.com avoiding further share price declines, urging investors to consider both the potential rewards and identified risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Exelixis: A Strong Contender in the Cancer Drug Market
feed.summary: This article highlights Exelixis (NASDAQ: EXEL) as a strong contender in the cancer drug market, referencing insights from a Motley Fool Scoreboard episode. It encourages potential investors to consider the company's prospects, while also noting that Exelixis was not among the "10 best stocks to buy now" identified by The Motley Fool Stock Advisor analyst team. The article also touches upon the past success of Stock Advisor recommendations like Netflix and Nvidia.

feed.title: Investor Notice: Camping World ($CWH) Stock Dropped 24% After Inventory Management Issues Announced - Investors Reminded of May 11 Deadline
feed.summary: Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Camping World Holdings, Inc. ($CWH) and its executives for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims Camping World made misrepresentations about its inventory management and retail demand, leading to significant stock drops, including a 24.8% decrease in October 2025. Investors who purchased Camping World securities have until May 11, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: [8-K] GOLDEN ENTERTAINMENT, INC. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Golden Entertainment, Inc. shareholders have approved the Master Transaction Agreement with Blake L. Sartini affiliates and VICI Properties Inc. at a special meeting on March 31, 2026. This approval clears the path for Golden Entertainment to go private, with closing anticipated in the second quarter of 2026, subject to regulatory approvals. Upon completion, the company's shares will be delisted from Nasdaq and deregistered, meaning public shareholders will no longer hold equity in the company.

feed.title: Short Interest in Castellum, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:CTM) Rises By 19.5%
feed.summary: Short interest in Castellum, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:CTM) increased by 19.5% to 4,596,457 shares as of March 13th, representing 6.9% of the company's float. The short-interest ratio for CTM is currently 6.4 days, based on an average daily volume of 715,251 shares. Despite low institutional ownership of 3.39%, several hedge funds like Jane Street Group, Quadrature Capital, and XTX Topco have recently increased or initiated positions in the company.

feed.title: Sjögren’s Syndrome Market Poised for Significant Expansion Through 2034, Driven by Advancing Pipeline Therapies and Rising Disease Burden | DelveInsight Analysis Featuring Astellas Pharma, Immunovant
feed.summary: The Sjögren’s syndrome market is projected for significant growth through 2034, driven by an expanding patient population, increased awareness, and a robust pipeline of emerging therapies. Key players like Astellas Pharma, Immunovant, Novartis AG, and Johnson & Johnson are advancing innovative treatments such as biologics and targeted therapies. The market, valued at approximately USD 1.9 billion in 2023 across the seven major markets, is expected to grow steadily, with the U.S. accounting for the largest share of diagnosed cases.

feed.title: Boqii (NYSE: BQ) CEO Hao Liang details multi-class share and option holdings
feed.summary: Boqii's CEO, Hao Liang, has filed an initial ownership report detailing his equity interests in the company. His holdings include 500,000 Class C ordinary shares, 51,964 Class B ordinary shares, 3,500 Class A ordinary shares, and stock options for an additional 196 Class A shares. The report also highlights the distinct voting rights and transferability conditions for each class of shares, with Class C shares carrying 100 votes but being nontransferable and nonconvertible, and Class B shares offering 20 votes and convertibility into Class A shares.

feed.title: Heartcore announces 1-for-20 reverse stock split
feed.summary: Heartcore Enterprises, Inc. has announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split, effective April 1, 2026. The company, which is primarily engaged in software development for Customer Experience Management and Digital Transformation, also recently authorized a $2 million share repurchase program and provided earnings guidance for fiscal year 2025.

feed.title: Did You Lose Money Investing in Coty Inc.? Robbins LLP
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging investors who suffered significant losses in Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) to contact them regarding a class action lawsuit filed on behalf of shareholders. The lawsuit alleges that Coty misled investors about its financial performance and growth outlook between November 5, 2025, and February 4, 2026. Following disappointing Q2 2026 results and a downward revision of guidance, Coty's stock price declined by approximately 22%.
